user.title: Glow DCC Backfill
user.description: Log in with your Bright account. The integration will automatically find your electricity consumption resource.

resource.title: Choose electricity resource
resource.description: Multiple electricity consumption resources were found. Choose the one you want to use.

tariff_count.title: Tariff type
tariff_count.description: Choose how many different electricity rates you have each day.

tariff_details.title: Tariff rates
tariff_details.description: Enter your tariff rates in pounds per kWh. Where possible, the standard rate is prefilled from Glowmarkt/Bright.

error.invalid_auth: Bright rejected the email or password.
error.no_resources: No electricity consumption resource was found on this Bright account.
